general.name: Restrictions - AirDrop & External Drives Allowed
general.description: Same as Photo Studio but allows AirDrop
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>8424E7B6-11CB-4BB5-A890-5AEBA9557E72</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>8424E7B6-11CB-4BB5-A890-5AEBA9557E72</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions - AirDrop & External Drives Allowed</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Same as Photo Studio but allows AirDrop</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>EC8D0017-C554-411B-AA16-3B7F5DAA7DA5</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.MCX</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>EC8D0017-C554-411B-AA16-3B7F5DAA7DA5</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>MCX</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>safariAllowAutoFill</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>746EFD05-BAD1-4EF6-BC65-B032FE84A9FA</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess.new</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>746EFD05-BAD1-4EF6-BC65-B032FE84A9FA</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Application Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>familyControlsEnabled</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>4362F27B-F426-4167-B7DF-7DF9242590F7</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.coremediaio.support</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>4362F27B-F426-4167-B7DF-7DF9242590F7</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CoreMediaIO Allowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>5E310E89-B822-4E48-9DC4-418415707969</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.DiscRecording</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>5E310E89-B822-4E48-9DC4-418415707969</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access: Disc Access: Finder Center</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>GKFeatureGameCenterAllowed</key><false/><key>GKFeatureAccountModificationAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureAddingGameCenterFriendsAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureMultiplayerGamingAllowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>A9436D74-F9EE-4A3C-952F-A3C2DB23193E</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>A9436D74-F9EE-4A3C-952F-A3C2DB23193E</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowCloudDocumentSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudDesktopAndDocuments</key><false/><key>allowSpotlightInternetResults</key><true/><key>allowMusicService</key><true/><key>allowCloudKeychainSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudBTMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudFMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudBookmarks</key><true/><key>allowCloudMail</key><true/><key>allowCloudCalendar</key><true/><key>allowCloudReminders</key><true/><key>allowCloudAddressBook</key><true/><key>allowCloudNotes</key><true/><key>allowPasswordSharing</key><true/><key>allowPasswordAutoFill</key><true/><key>allowPasswordProximityRequests</key><true/><key>allowCamera</key><true/><key>allowContentCaching</key><true/><key>allowCloudPrivateRelay</key><true/><key>allowUniversalControl</key><true/><key>allowAirDrop</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseInstallation</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseRemoval</key><true/><key>allowUIConfigurationProfileInstallation</key><true/><key>allowUSBRestrictedMode</key><true/><key>allowCloudFreeform</key><true/><key>allowLocalUserCreation</key><true/><key>allowStartupDiskModification</key><true/><key>allowTimeMachineBackup</key><true/><key>allowARDRemoteManagementModification</key><true/><key>allowBluetoothSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowFileSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowInternetSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowPrinterSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowRemoteAppleEventsModification</key><true/><key>allowAccountModification</key><true/><key>allowDeviceNameModification</key><true/><key>allowAssistant</key><true/><key>allowFingerprintModification</key><true/><key>allowCloudPhotoLibrary</key><true/><key>allowGenmoji</key><false/><key>allowImagePlayground</key><false/><key>allowiPhoneMirroring</key><false/><key>allowWritingTools</key><false/><key>forceBypassScreenCaptureAlert</key><false/><key>allowMailSummary</key><false/><key>allowMediaSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowExternalIntelligenceIntegrations</key><false/><key>allowNotesTranscriptionSummary</key><false/><key>allowAppleIntelligenceReport</key><false/><key>allowMailSmartReplies</key><false/><key>allowSafariSummary</key><false/><key>allowNotesTranscription</key><false/><key>allowSafariHistoryClearing</key><true/><key>allowSafariPrivateBrowsing</key><true/><key>forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedMajorSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>allowAirPrint</key><true/><key>forceAirPrintTrustedTLSRequirement</key><false/><key>allowAirPrintiBeaconDiscovery</key><true/><key>allowScreenShot</key><true/><key>allowRemoteScreenObservation</key><true/><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedScreenObservation</key><false/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowFingerprintForUnlock</key><true/><key>enforcedFingerprintTimeout</key><integer>172800</integer><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock</key><false/><key>forceClassroomAutomaticallyJoinClasses</key><false/><key>forceClassroomRequestPermissionToLeaveClasses</key><false/><key>allowEraseContentAndSettings</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>7A17843A-ACA7-4F18-9969-36984D02A2AD</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.systempreferences</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>7A17843A-ACA7-4F18-9969-36984D02A2AD</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>System computer_group.name: Config Prof - Restrictions - AirDrop & External Drives Allowed
